package.name: vimbax_camera_color_correction_cpp
package.description:
High-performance C++ implementation of 3D LUT color correction for ROS2. This package provides optimized color correction using trilinear interpolation with OpenMP parallelization for real-time processing.
Features: - Fast 3D LUT application using optimized C++ code - OpenMP multi-threading for parallel processing - Support for binary (.bin) and numpy (.npy) LUT file formats - RGB and BGR input/output support - Performance monitoring and logging
